testcase.name: testFullLiveChainSupportsResumeAtEveryBoundaryForFixture with data set "fixture-api"
testcase.error:
Tests\E2E\ChainResumeE2ETest::testFullLiveChainSupportsResumeAtEveryBoundaryForFixture with data set "fixture-api" App\Orchestrator\OrchestratorException: Chain aborted: hop 8->9 failed with exit code 1. Last stderr: {"type":"composer.started","data":{"workspace":"/repo"}} | {"type":"dependency_blocker","data":{"package":"guzzlehttp/guzzle","severity":"warning","reason":"Package not found in compatibility matrix."}} | {"type":"composer.install_started","data":[]} | {"type":"composer.failed","data":{"message":"composer install failed: Loading composer repositories with package information
https://repo.packagist.org could not be fully loaded (curl error 6 while downloading https://repo.packagist.org/packages.json: Could not resolve host: repo.packagist.org), package information was loaded from the local cache and may be out of date
The following exception probably indicates you are offline or have misconfigured DNS resolver(s)

In CurlDownloader.php line 401:
 
 curl error 6 while downloading https://repo.packagist.org/p2/guzzlehttp/guz 
 zle.json: Could not resolve host: repo.packagist.org

"}} | {"event":"dependency_error","error":"composer install failed: Loading composer repositories with package information
https://repo.packagist.org could not be fully loaded (curl error 6 while downloading https://repo.packagist.org/packages.json: Could not resolve host: repo.packagist.org), package information was loaded from the local cache and may be out of date
The following exception probably indicates you are offline or have misconfigured DNS resolver(s)

 curl error 6 while downloading https://repo.packagist.org/p2/guzzlehttp/guz 
 zle.json: Could not resolve host: repo.packagist.org

testcase.failure:
